notes: Multi-vitamin market is saturated with better-known brands. Targeted blends exist (Athletic Greens, Ritual, etc). No clear differentiation angle.
Melatonin sprays already exist in US (Onnit, NorVita, Cani Brands, Dr. Mercola). Branding could be better but market is served.

product_name: NHCO Retinium Eye Health Dual Formula
notes: AM/PM formulation is complex and targets aging eyes (seniors). Validated Visiocare for younger screen-user market instead.

product_name: Biocyte Eclat Extrême Dark Spot Reducer
notes: Oral dark spot reducers exist (Musely, SkinMedica, etc). Topical products dominate this category. Oral supplements for hyperpigmentation are niche.
Glow/beauty supplements are crowded (HUM, Moon Juice, Sakara, Olly, etc). No clear differentiation. Validated drinkable collagen instead.
Fitness-targeted joint supplements already exist (Jocko Joint Warfare, Legion Fortify, Driven FLUID). Market is well-served.
Premium omega-3 market is crowded (Nordic Naturals, Carlson, Sports Research, etc). Commodity ingredient with strong competition.
Bioderma is already heavily imported and available on Amazon with good reviews. Garnier also makes affordable micellar water in US.
Caudalie is already sold in US (Sephora, Ulta, Amazon). Micellar water category is served by Bioderma, Garnier, Simple.
Already widely available in US at CVS, Walgreens, Target, Amazon. La Roche-Posay is owned by L'Oréal with strong US distribution.

product_name: Nuxe Rêve de Miel Lip Balm
notes: Premium lip balm market is crowded (Laneige, Glossier, Burt's Bees luxury, etc). Nuxe is also imported. Hard to differentiate.

product_name: Nuxe Huile Prodigieuse Multi-Purpose Dry Oil
notes: Multi-use oils are common in US (Josie Maran, Herbivore, Drunk Elephant, The Ordinary). Nuxe is also available via import.
Acne treatment market is massive and crowded (CeraVe, Differin, Paula's Choice, The Ordinary, etc). Hard to break in.
Validated the thermal water spray concept with REFRESH brand idea. Same product category.
Full skincare line is too complex and capital-intensive for first launch. Need single hero product to start.
Clean skincare line is too broad. Market is saturated (Drunk Elephant, Youth to the People, Versed, The Inkey List, etc).
Validated the essential oil stress relief concept instead. Plant-based anti-anxiety supplements exist (Calm, Ashwagandha brands, etc).

product_name: French Cod Liver Oil & Mushroom Supplements
notes: Cod liver oil exists (Carlson, Nordic Naturals). Mushroom supplements are trending but crowded (Om, Four Sigmatic, Host Defense).
Probiotic market is massive and crowded (Garden of Life, Culturelle, Seed, Ritual, etc). Hard to differentiate.
Herbal supplement market is massive. Would need very specific positioning to break through. Too broad as stated.
